outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected short-term due to positive GEX in near expiries, but negative Monthly GEX introduces tail risk for directional bursts.
outlook.summary: Market structure shows a distinct bearish skew and high put/call ratios, indicating strong hedging activity. Spot is trapped between immediate resistance at 675 and major structural support at 650. Positive dealer gamma in 0DTE and Weekly expiries promotes mean-reverting, stable price action towards Max Pain levels, while the negative Monthly GEX warrants caution for larger moves.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to highly positive total GEX (34.39B). Dealers will aggressively suppress volatility within the 6800-6850 range.
outlook.summary: The market is heavily pinned by a positive GEX environment (34.39B), leading to suppressed volatility and range-bound price action. The 6800 RESONANCE level acts as a high-conviction floor, while 6850 and 6900 provide layered resistance. Despite a persistent bearish volatility skew, dealer hedging dynamics favor mean-reversion strategies between these gamma strikes. The massive 7000 Put OI in the Monthly expiration serves as a structural upside magnet.

levels.motivazione: Harmonic Resonance of Call OI across all expirations. 0DTE (4864), WEEKLY (10792), and MONTHLY (5059+6432) create a massive structural support right below spot.
Strong Call OI in 0DTE (6972) and WEEKLY (5521). Acts as a confluence resistance ceiling directly above the current spot price.
Major Call OI in WEEKLY (6453) and MONTHLY (17888). Acts as a strong upper boundary, aligning near the Monthly Max Pain (6925).
Heavy Put OI in WEEKLY (4398) and MONTHLY (23871) establishes a firm structural floor and primary downside target.
Significant Put OI across WEEKLY (5952) and MONTHLY (21693). Represents a deeper support level and extreme downside anchor.
Massive Put OI (124039) in the MONTHLY expiration. This acts as a powerful upward magnet due to dealer delta hedging.
Significant Call OI (14225) in the MONTHLY expiration creates an ultimate upside resistance barrier.
High Call OI (5895) and volume (111k) in 0DTE. Acts as immediate intraday friction and minor support.
0DTE Gamma Flip level. A drop below this point shifts the intraday gamma profile from positive to negative, amplifying volatility.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected. Positive Total GEX suppresses market movements and promotes mean-reversion.
outlook.summary: The market is dominated by a massive positive GEX across all expiries, creating a highly stable environment. Spot is hovering just above the 25000 level, which exhibits extreme volume and Open Interest convergence, acting as a powerful price magnet. Upside is strictly capped by layered Call Walls, while structural supports are anchored deep below.

Highest MONTHLY Put OI (533), 0DTE Put OI (68), and the exact Max Pain for 0DTE and MONTHLY. Ultimate structural floor.
